items.title: The Phoenix Suns have tendered qualifying offers to Mark Williams and Koby Brea, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Phoenix Suns have tendered qualifying offers to Mark Williams and Koby Brea, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Williams and Brea will now be restricted free agents this offseason.
